title: ParagraphStyle
description: Styles that apply to a whole paragraph. Inherited paragraph styles are represented as unset fields.

headingId.description: The heading ID of the paragraph.

namedStyleType.description: The named style type of the paragraph.

alignment.description: The text alignment for this paragraph.

lineSpacing.description: The amount of space between lines as a percentage of normal, where normal is represented as 100.0.

direction.description: The text direction of this paragraph.

spacingMode.description: The spacing mode for the paragraph.

tabStops.description: A list of the tab stops for this paragraph, sorted in ascending order of the tab stop offset.

keepLinesTogether.description: Whether all lines of the paragraph should be laid out on the same page or column if possible.

keepWithNext.description: Whether at least a part of this paragraph should be laid out on the same page or column as the next paragraph if possible.

avoidWidowAndOrphan.description: Whether to avoid widows and orphans for the paragraph.

pageBreakBefore.description: Whether the current paragraph should always start at the beginning of a page.
